parameters.content:
## Bizbull · Voice Order → GHL
**Phase 0 · Production sync**

**Purpose**
Receive placed-order events from Sierra / PowerShell tests → upsert GoHighLevel contact → set last-order custom fields → re-arm + apply tags so **confirm SMS fires on every order**.

**Prod URL**
`POST /webhook/sierra-ghl-sync`

**Auth**
Header Auth credential on all GHL HTTP nodes:
`Authorization: Bearer <PIT>`

**Docs**
`docs/plan/13-ghl-n8n-order-sync.md` §7.1 / §8.1

## 1 · INGEST
Receive HTTPS POST.
Path kept as `sierra-ghl-sync` for stable URL.
Always respond via **Respond** node (not webhook default).

## 2 · TRANSFORM
Normalize envelope → phone, name, tags[], customFields[], upsertBody.
Field IDs locked in plan §7.1.
No “sierra” labels — source = **Voice Agent**.

## 3 · GATE
**TRUE** → phone ≥ 7 digits → GHL path.
**FALSE** → skip CRM (no SMS possible without phone).
Fail-open for caller; we still return HTTP 200.

## 4 · GHL WRITE (happy path)
1. **Upsert** contact + last-order custom fields
2. **Remove** `order-placed` (re-arm SMS trigger)
3. **Add** tags: `voice-order`, `order-placed`, `pickup`|`delivery`

GHL Workflow listens on tag **order-placed** → confirm SMS.
Remove→re-add = SMS on **every** order (hourly/daily OK).
Tags are appended (other tags preserved).

## 5 · OUT
Build JSON summary for caller/logs.
Always **200** so Sierra never blocks on CRM.

## SKIP · No phone
No GHL upsert / no SMS.
Returns `{ ok: true, ghl: skipped_no_phone }`.
Optional later: owner alert only.

nodes.name: 01 · Receive Order Webhook
nodes.notes: Entry: POST order.placed (and future events). Production: /webhook/sierra-ghl-sync

nodes.name: 02 · Set GHL Location ID
nodes.notes: Bizbull sub-account locationId. includeOtherFields keeps webhook body.

nodes.name: 03 · Normalize Order Payload
nodes.notes: Builds upsertBody + tagsToAdd + hasPhone. Single source of truth for GHL mapping.

nodes.name: 04 · Gate · Has Phone?
nodes.notes: TRUE = GHL path. FALSE = skip (no reliable contact key / no SMS).

nodes.name: 05 · GHL · Upsert Contact + Fields
nodes.notes: Upsert by phone. Sets last_order_* custom fields. Does NOT set tags here.

nodes.name: 06 · GHL · Re-arm SMS (remove order-placed)
nodes.notes: Clears order-placed so GHL 'tag added' workflow can fire again on next add (multi-order / same day).

nodes.name: 07 · GHL · Apply Order Tags
nodes.notes: Appends voice-order, order-placed, pickup|delivery. Triggers confirm SMS workflow.

nodes.name: 04b · Skip · No Phone
nodes.notes: No CRM write. Still HTTP 200 to caller.

nodes.name: 08 · Build Success Response
nodes.notes: Compact JSON for Sierra logs / PowerShell tests.

nodes.name: 09 · Respond 200 OK
nodes.notes: Always 200 — CRM must never block the voice path.
